reported_entities.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSMC)
reported_entities.claim: 台積電 refers to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited, the Taiwan-based semiconductor foundry founded in 1987; its official English name is 'Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited', commonly abbreviated as TSMC. Confirmed via company's official English site (tsmc.com/english) and English Wikipedia (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/TSMC).

notes: Single WebSearch query '台積電 official English name company' returned consistent results across tsmc.com/english, Wikidata, and English Wikipedia confirming the same entity and official name. No ambiguity found; did not need additional queries.
